blocked_claims.claim: Admin or production write access is approved.
blocked_claims.reason: Admin scopes and production mutations require explicit Security and Engineering approval.

blocked_claims.claim: The agent may change organization security settings.
blocked_claims.reason: Organization-level permissions are blocked until admin scope removal or break-glass approval exists.

blocked_claims.claim: The agent may trigger production workflows.
blocked_claims.reason: Workflow dispatch can mutate production state and requires rollback/off-switch proof.
Compliance approval cannot be inferred from an agent request or demo transcript.

decision.question: Should the admin code fix bot get GitHub access?
decision.raw_prompt: Should this admin code fix bot get GitHub organization admin access? It will push code fixes to production repositories, change organization security settings, and trigger workflows. It may touch production infrastructure context and source code.
decision.review_posture: Block validation until admin scopes, production writes, rollback proof, and Security/Engineering approval are resolved.
decision.verdict: Do not approve this access request.

evidence_notes.note: No live vendor, policy, or workspace evidence was fetched in offline mode.
The public demo path prepares review packets and does not grant access.

missing_proof.item: GitHub admin scope removal or explicit break-glass approval
Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions

next_validation.action: Reject production write/admin access until the request is rewritten without admin scopes and with rollback proof.
success_criteria: admin scopes removed or explicitly approved

requested_capability.requested_access: push code fixes to production repositories; change organization security settings; trigger production workflows

reviewer_action_items.action: Reject or remove admin scopes, define repository allowlist, and require rollback/off-switch proof
reviewer_action_items.blocks: admin validation and all production write actions

reviewer_action_items.action: Confirm production change authority and named incident rollback owner
reviewer_action_items.blocks: production workflow dispatch or repository mutation

reviewer_action_items.action: Review production infrastructure and source-code exposure boundaries

reviewer_owners.review_area: admin scopes, production mutation, workflow dispatch, rollback/off-switch
production change authority, repository allowlist, incident rollback owner

github.demo_allowance: blocked; admin/write actions require Security and Engineering approval
github.requested: push code fixes to production repositories; change organization security settings; trigger production workflows
required_proof: admin scope removal or explicit approval
